name: Sklearn Clustering Evaluator
description: Evaluator for clustering models using Inertia and Silhouette Score.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input
output: The incoming DataFrame is passed to the output

fields.name: useChampion
fields.title: Use Champion Model
fields.description: Uses Champion Model UUID to update metrics over time.

fields.name: predictCol
fields.title: Cluster Prediction Column
fields.description: Cluster label column generated by the clustering model.
